examples: It should be tender and moist but not gummy or doughy.
Pasty, doughy. Term applied to some very heavily coloured wines rich in dry extract.
The fresh, doughy hubcap-sized Bavarian pretzels alone are worth waiting in the line that forms on weekends.
Founded in 2008 by Danny Gabriner, it began as a home experiment with sourdough baking that resulted in a doughy vision.
